summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on PSN field
Join result with aircraft table on aircraft registration to obtain aircraft type
For each APU (identified by PSN), select only the latest reference date from rotables_trend
Filter trend_type to only include CT5 records
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft type
Only the latest reference date is included for each APU
CT5 trend type values are correctly populated with CT5ATP values
Workorder information is included when present in event_perfno_i field
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query executes against AMOS Acceptance environment initially, with production connection to be configured at go-live
